name: NodeGoat A8 — CSRF protection middleware removed from Express app

provenance.note: Inverted the documented 'Fix for A8 - CSRF': removed the csurf require and app.use(csrf()) so state-changing POSTs have no anti-CSRF token.

notes: State-changing routes (profile, allocations, memos) accept cross-site forged requests. NodeGoat A8 CSRF.
